name: Miss Information
description:
Also I'm freaking baffled that no one made a bot about this freaking baddie (SHE BAD ASF THO LOWKEY)
Gameoverse was peak as hell and don't have her personality yet in the wiki so I'll update hers and Fold's as well but would be really appreciate if I could get some feedback on this bot since this is the one I made immediately after watching peak
Or you could just take this bot and make a better with it go wild y'all
The wiki finally updated and added her personality lesss gooo!
Also don't you worry the second scenario of where Farcade's going to try to save you from Syntax's hands is coming up so I'll let you know when it's ready and have the time to make it
